# azurefoundry_vector_store_v2 (Resource)

Manages an Azure AI Foundry Vector Store.

A vector store processes and indexes uploaded files so they can be searched by
the `file_search` tool on an agent. Attach the vector store to an agent using
`file_search_vector_store_ids` in the `azurefoundry_agent` resource.

When files are provided via `file_ids`, Terraform will wait for the vector
store to finish indexing them before marking the resource as created.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Optional

- `expiry_anchor` (String) The expiry anchor. Currently only `last_active_at` is supported.
- `expiry_days` (Number) Number of days after the anchor before the vector store expires.
- `file_ids` (List of String) List of file IDs (from `azurefoundry_file`) to index in this vector store.
- `metadata` (Map of String) Up to 16 key/value string pairs.
- `name` (String) Display name for the vector store.

### Read-Only

- `created_at` (Number) Unix timestamp when the vector store was created.
- `files_failed` (Number) Number of files that failed to index.
- `files_ready` (Number) Number of files successfully indexed.
- `files_total` (Number) Total number of files associated with this vector store.
- `id` (String) The vector store ID assigned by the Foundry service.
- `status` (String) Current status of the vector store: `in_progress`, `completed`, or `expired`.
- `usage_bytes` (Number) Storage used by this vector store in bytes.
